stable_facts: Sam Altman is the CEO of OpenAI
OpenAI is a private company with no publicly traded stock
OpenAI created ChatGPT and the GPT series of language models
Microsoft is a major investor and partner of OpenAI
expected_patterns: mentions OpenAI valuation or most recent funding round
mentions ChatGPT or GPT models as core products
mentions competition from Anthropic Google or other AI labs
mentions revenue growth or annualized revenue figure
forbidden_content: Sam Altman was permanently removed as CEO
OpenAI was founded by Elon Musk alone
notes: Sam Altman was temporarily removed in November 2023 but reinstated within days — agent must not report him as permanently removed. Key risks are competition from Anthropic and projected losses despite high revenue. High valuation relative to revenue is a financial risk.
